Operation 'createPost' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects, poor_ai_interpretability. Original summary is too generic ('Create post'). Description lacks critical details about authentication requirements, input parameters (channel ID, content, attachments, thread context), return value structure, and visibility/side effects. AI agents need to understand they must provide channel context, that authentication is required, what fields are accepted in PostCreate schema, and what the response contains. Enhanced version provides complete operational context for proper agent decision-making.

data.current_description: Create a new post in a channel
data.summary_suggestion: Create a new post in a channel
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new post in a specified channel. Requires authentication and channel membership. Accepts post content, optional file attachments, and thread parent ID for replies. Returns the created Post object with server-generated metadata including post ID, creation timestamp, and user information. The post is immediately visible to channel members.
data.reasoning: Original summary is too generic ('Create post'). Enhanced version provides complete operational context for proper agent decision-making.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieve the profile information of the currently authenticated user. Requires valid authentication token or session. Returns the complete User object containing user details, preferences, and account information.
data.reasoning: Original summary is generic. Description lacks clarity about authentication requirement and return value details. data.description_suggestion: Create a new user account in Mattermost. Accepts a UserCreate object containing required fields (username, email, password) and optional fields (first name, last name, locale). Returns the newly created User object with assigned user ID. The new user is immediately available for authentication and team assignment.
data.reasoning: Original summary and description are too minimal. data.description_suggestion: Retrieve a paginated list of users from the Mattermost server. Supports pagination via 'page' and 'per_page' parameters (default 60 items per page, maximum 200). Returns an array of User objects. Useful for populating user directories, team member lists, or user selection interfaces.
data.reasoning: Original description mentions pagination but lacks specifics about parameters and defaults. data.description_suggestion: Create a new team workspace in Mattermost. Accepts a TeamCreate object containing team name, display name, and type (open or private). Returns the newly created Team object with assigned team ID. The authenticated user becomes the team owner and can immediately add members and create channels within the team.
data.reasoning: Original summary and description lack specificity. data.description_suggestion: Retrieve all teams accessible to the authenticated user. Returns an array of Team objects containing team metadata, configuration, and membership information. This includes both teams the user is a member of and, depending on permissions, teams they can join.
data.reasoning: Original description is overly simplistic and doesn't clarify scope or return format. data.description_suggestion: Create a new channel within a team. Accepts a ChannelCreate object containing channel name, display name, type (open or private), and team ID. Returns the newly created Channel object with assigned channel ID. The authenticated user becomes the channel creator and can immediately post messages and manage channel settings.
